description: Phase 36 scan_invariants_manifest: config/invariants.json (R24+26 formalization of atlas↔engine functor F) must exist and have a well-formed schema — top-level keys {schema, atoms, semiring_operations, foundation_relations, euclid_euler_generator, closing_theorem} present, at least 10 atoms, and every atom has {value, atlas_ref, engine_count, engine_value} fields. P36 is presence-only; value verification (does engine_value match live structural count?) is reserved for a future P37 gate. Gate: healthy == true.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_invariants_manifest.json ] && jq -r "if .healthy == true then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_invariants_manifest.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
